name: Genshin Resin Tracker
description:
Shows current Genshin Impact resin energy in the top panel using HoYoLAB API.

* Multi-account with per-account region
* Resin counter with color coding and live countdown
* Commissions, bosses, expeditions, realm currency, transformer
* Module reordering and toggles per account
* Persistent cache survives restarts and network outages
* Copies UID to clipboard (St.Clipboard, declared)
